description: Interactive animator that transforms a vector from its current state to a target vector
utility: Animate vector transformations and rotations with play/reset control

arguments.name: sourceVector
arguments.description: Variable reference to an existing vector to animate

arguments.name: targetVector
arguments.description: Target vector expression (can be inline or variable reference)

arguments.name: styles
arguments.description: Optional styling: c(), s(), t(), defer(), etc.

examples.scenario: Animate a vector to a new direction
examples.expression:
G = g2d(at(4,19), size(16), range(-5, 5), type(geometry))
A = point(G, 0, 0)
B = point(G, 3, 1)
C = point(G, 1, 4)
V1 = vector(G, A, B)
vanim_1 = vectoranimator(V1, vector(G, A, C))

examples.scenario: Animate vector to another named vector
examples.expression:
G = g2d(at(4,19), size(16), range(-5, 5), type(geometry))
V1 = vector(G, point(G, 0, 0), point(G, 3, 0))
V2 = vector(G, point(G, 0, 0), point(G, 0, 4))
vanim_1 = vectoranimator(V1, V2)
